docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-23-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-22-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF HOSSEIN KAJOUEE OR DEFENDANT JOE MICKELSON. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. MATTER IS ON CALENDAR TODAY FOR A PROGRESS REPORT. AT THE LAST CALLING OF THE CASE ON 5/17/16 DEFENDANT AGREED TO MAKE MONTHLY PAYMENTS TO PLAINTIFF OF $100.00 COMMENCING 6/17/16 AND CONTINUING UNTIL OUTSTANDING BALANCE OF $1,200.00 IS PAID JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
DECLARATION OF HOSSEIN KAJOUEE RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAJOUEE, HOSSEIN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-22-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-28-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF HOSSEIN KAJOUEE. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JOE MICKELSON. PER COURT ORDER SIGNED MAY 17, 2016, DEFENDANT AGREES TO MAKE MONTHLY PAYMENTS TO THE PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 OR MORE BY CHECK BEGINNING JUNE 17, 2016 UNTIL FULL AMOUNT OF $1,200.00 IS PAID. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG, CLERK S. LE. NOT REPORTED (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY KAJOUEE, HOSSEIN AS TO DEFENDANT MICKELSON, JOE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-29-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-06-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MICKELSON, JOE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-28-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-28-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF HOSSEIN KAJOUEE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOE MICKELSON IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-28-2017 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-17-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-23-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT AGREES TO MAKE MONTHLY PAYMENTS TO PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $100 OR MORE BY CHECK BEGINNING JUN-17-2016 AND CONTINUING UNTIL THE FULL AMOUNT OF $1200 IS PAID. IF DEFENDANT DEFAULTS, A JUDGMENT WILL ISSUE FOR THE REMAINING BALANCE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERKS: L. FONG AND S. RAVINANTAPRICHA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-17-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-29-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
ORDER CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 28, 2017 AT 1:30 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KAJOUEE, HOSSEIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MICKELSON, JOE $700.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $790.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
